projects.name: Idae
projects.tagline: DDD multi-tenant platform with MongoDB-like query engine
projects.description: Full-stack monorepo powering Idae-Machine, a domain-driven multi-tenant SvelteKit application. Ships a MongoDB-like query engine, real-time socket layer, reactive state management, and a pluggable API backend, all typed end-to-end in TypeScript.

projects.name: @medyll/css-base
projects.tagline: Native CSS design system: zero build, zero preprocessor
projects.description: Pure CSS design system built on cutting-edge native features: OKLCH color space, CSS @function, and attr() type coercion. No preprocessor, no build step, no runtime. Published on npm and production-ready.

projects.name: wollama-monorepo
projects.tagline: Local-first AI chat: web, desktop and mobile with Ollama
projects.description: Cross-platform AI chat application powered by Ollama for fully local, private inference. Supports text and voice (STT/TTS), real-time RxDB↔PouchDB sync, an extensible hooks system, and web agents. Runs in-browser, as an Electron desktop app, and on mobile via Capacitor.
highlights: Local inference: no cloud, no telemetry

projects.name: sive
projects.tagline: AI writing assistant: production since v1.0
projects.description: Full-featured writing application with real-time AI suggestions, narrative coherence analysis, and mobile-first design. Built on SvelteKit 5 and Tailwind v4. Production-ready since v1.0 with a clean, distraction-free editor.

projects.name: domus
projects.tagline: Reactive UI framework in Rust: web + desktop, zero JS
projects.description: Reactive UI framework written entirely in Rust, targeting both web (WASM) and native desktop with zero JavaScript overhead. Alpha stage (v0.1.0), a bet on Rust as the future of cross-platform UI.

projects.name: humemory
projects.tagline: Human-like memory with progressive decay for AI agents
projects.description: Memory system for AI agents modeled on human forgetting curves. Implements 5-level trace decay where recall events reinforce memory strength. The system resurfaces relevant context proactively, before you think to ask. Zero runtime dependencies.

projects.name: latent-line
projects.tagline: AI-driven scene and story production pipeline
projects.description: SvelteKit SPA for orchestrating AI-driven story and scene production. Combines an interactive timeline editor with asset management, real-time model inspection, and a CI pipeline on GitHub Actions.

projects.name: jobber
projects.tagline: Local resume tailor: Ollama rewrite, ATS PDF, Playwright autofill
projects.description: Local-first tool that matches your resume to a job description, rewrites targeted sections with Ollama, generates ATS-friendly PDFs, and auto-fills job applications via Playwright. No cloud, no subscription, no data sent externally.
highlights: Fully local: no cloud, no API key

projects.name: Protonesk
projects.tagline: ProtonMail via IMAP/SMTP/CardDAV: MCP bridge over hydroxide
projects.description: MCP server that bridges ProtonMail's encrypted ecosystem to any standard mail client. Built on top of hydroxide, it exposes IMAP, SMTP, and CardDAV endpoints. Ships with Windows auto-start and zero-config setup.

projects.name: pseudo-stack
projects.tagline: Vanilla HTML component system: 7.7 KB, zero dependencies
projects.description: Zero-dependency vanilla HTML component system at 7.7 KB gzip. Provides a structured tag taxonomy, display-hint suffixes, and WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility out of the box, no build step, no framework, no lock-in.
highlights: WCAG 2.2 AA out of the box

projects.name: SingletonNotepad
projects.tagline: Windows 11 notepad backed by a single Markdown file
projects.description: Minimal WinUI 3 notepad that persists everything in one Markdown file. Auto-saves every 2 seconds with optional LLM normalization to keep notes structured. Single binary, no sync service, no account.

projects.name: Registry Mind
projects.tagline: Android on-device OCR sensor synced over Tailscale
projects.description: Android screen-capture sensor for Oppo Find X9. Triggers via Snap Key, runs on-device OCR with ML Kit, and syncs results to an OpenClaw desktop instance over Tailscale, replacing Oppo's proprietary AI Mind Space with a fully self-hosted pipeline.
highlights: On-device OCR via ML Kit, no cloud

projects.name: @medyll/svelte-5-documentor
projects.tagline: AST-based metadata extractor for Svelte 5 components
projects.description: Parses Svelte 5 component source via AST to extract props, exports, generics, and JSDoc comments, generating structured documentation without invoking the compiler. Drop-in for any TypeScript toolchain.

projects.name: Ferule-Core
projects.tagline: Research space for formal languages of cognition and org structure
projects.description: Exploratory research project defining two formal languages, a matrix topology language and a dynamic structural mapping model, to express cognition and organizational structure. Includes an LLM engine for generating context-aware indicators across 9 domains and an interactive 3D visualization built with Three.js.
highlights: Two formal languages: matrix topology + structural mapping

projects.name: idae.api
projects.tagline: PHP/MongoDB REST + IDQL API for the Idae platform
projects.description: Lightweight PHP REST API backed by MongoDB, built around a router → API parser → query layer pattern. Exposes a custom IDQL query language for find/group/distinct/parallel operations alongside generic REST endpoints, plus a small Node helper process for sockets and crons. Dockerized with a PHPUnit test suite.
highlights: IDQL query language: find, group, distinct, parallel
Router → API parser → query layer architecture

projects.name: Idae Legacy
projects.tagline: Migrating a 2014 PHP/MongoDB CMS to a 2026 stack
projects.description: Live migration of a legacy PHP 5.6, Node.js and MongoDB CMS onto PHP 8.2, a modern MongoDB driver and a Dockerized environment, keeping the original UI and behavior intact while modernizing the internals underneath.
